content_of_post_to_answer: Why do NEET exam invigilators seem so disorganized, and how can you stay focused despite the distractions?
answer: A lot of what looks like disorganization is a consequence of scale. NEET centers are trying to enforce strict procedures for hundreds of anxious students at once, and efficiency often gets sacrificed for compliance. The useful shift is to treat every interruption—seat checks, announcements, document verification—as part of the exam environment, not as an exception to it. Students who expect perfect silence are fighting two battles; students who expect noise only have to solve the paper.
